proposals.thesis: Best-in-class returns on capital in a structurally growing obesity/diabetes market, now well below its highs as the GLP-1 hype cooled. The valuation has reset to a sensible multiple for a durable compounder.
proposals.valuation_note: ~24x earnings with high-teens growth and ~4% yield, off peak multiples
proposals.what_would_make_this_wrong: Clinical/pipeline setbacks or Lilly competition erode the franchise faster than expected
proposals.tax_note: Buy — no realization. On a regular depot a later sale is a taxable event. Approx 8 whole shares.

proposals.thesis: Wide-moat franchise across cloud (Azure), productivity software and AI, with durable double-digit growth and exceptional returns on capital. Trades around 22x earnings after a pullback from its 2025 high.
proposals.what_would_make_this_wrong: Azure growth decelerates sharply, or AI capex fails to convert into returns
proposals.tax_note: Buy — no realization. US stock: buy for ~2,375 DKK (fractional ≈ 1.0 share).

proposals.thesis: Dominant Search and YouTube advertising plus a fast-growing cloud business throwing off enormous free cash flow. The cheapest of the mega-cap compounders on earnings, recently weaker on AI-talent-departure headlines.
proposals.what_would_make_this_wrong: AI disrupts search economics, or ad spend structurally weakens
proposals.tax_note: Buy — no realization. US stock: buy for ~2,375 DKK (fractional ≈ 1.06 shares).

proposals.thesis: A diversified collection of high-quality businesses with a fortress balance sheet and large cash reserves — the portfolio's ballast and a hedge against the tech names. Conservatively run with a low drawdown profile.
proposals.what_would_make_this_wrong: Prolonged value/insurance underperformance or a major post-Buffett capital-allocation misstep
proposals.tax_note: Buy — no realization. US stock: buy for ~2,375 DKK (fractional ≈ 0.74 share).

proposals.thesis: The 'picks-and-shovels' supplier to life-sciences research and pharma, with a wide moat and recurring revenue. Down ~15% year-to-date and trading below most fair-value estimates.
proposals.what_would_make_this_wrong: A prolonged biotech/pharma funding downturn keeps demand depressed
proposals.tax_note: Buy — no realization. US stock: buy for ~2,375 DKK (fractional ≈ 0.75 share).

proposals.thesis: Defensive global staples leader with strong brands, a ~3% dividend yield and low correlation to the tech names — diversification ballast. Steady cash generation through cycles.
proposals.what_would_make_this_wrong: Volume growth stays negative or brands lose pricing power
proposals.tax_note: Buy — no realization. Swiss stock: approx 4 whole shares (~2,610 DKK).

proposals.thesis: The world's leading luxury house with pricing power and high returns, trading near 52-week lows after a luxury-demand slowdown. A high-quality cyclical bought when sentiment is weak.
proposals.valuation_note: Below its 5-year average multiple on depressed earnings
proposals.what_would_make_this_wrong: A deeper, longer luxury downturn (esp. China) than expected
proposals.tax_note: Buy — no realization. French stock at ~3,685 DKK/share: needs fractional, else REJECT and we add later.

proposals.thesis: The monopoly supplier of EUV lithography equipment essential to advanced chips — a near-irreplaceable moat with a long order backlog. Very high share price, so size it small.
proposals.valuation_note: Premium multiple justified by the moat; cyclical entry point
proposals.what_would_make_this_wrong: A deep semiconductor capex downturn or export-control escalation hits orders
proposals.tax_note: Buy — no realization. Dutch stock at ~11,615 DKK/share: ONLY via fractional (~0.2 share). If you can't, REJECT — do not buy a whole share.
